flow_points: United States of America scored 53 runs for 1 wicket in a strong Powerplay start.
SR Mukkamalla anchored the USA innings with 79(53), contributing 40.3% of the total runs.
SC van Schalkwyk (3 wickets for 21 runs) and BFW de Leede (3 wickets for 37 runs) provided key breakthroughs for Netherlands.
Netherlands struggled in their Powerplay, losing 3 wickets for 51 runs, failing to build a stable foundation.
Harmeet Singh delivered a crucial spell for USA, taking 4 wickets for just 21 runs.
Shubham Ranjane maintained exceptional defensive pressure for USA with an economy of 4.0.
Netherlands suffered from a lack of boundary frequency, hitting one every 13.6 balls, increasing pressure.
Under extreme chase pressure (Index: 87.0), Netherlands experienced a late-innings collapse.
United States of America secured a commanding 93-run victory.
